quote.issuer_name: Beijing Shougang LanzaTech Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.nm: Beijing Shougang LanzaTech Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.summary: Beijing Shougang Lanzatech Technology Co Ltd is a China-based company primarily engaged in carbon capture, utilization and storage (CCUS) industry. The Company mainly focusing on producing low-carbon products including ethanol and microbial protein through carbon capture and utilization technologies and providing low-carbon integrated solutions. The Company's main products include ethanol, microbial protein, and other by-products. The Company's ethanol products mainly used in raw material for automotive fuel, in the production of downstream products such as perfumes, cosmetics, cleaning agents, packaging materials, and sustainable fashion. The microbial protein products mainly used in downstream products such as fish feed, piglet feed, and poultry feed. The Company mainly operates its businesses in the domestic market.
